instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: My order hasn't arrived after two weeks.
response: I'm really sorry to hear your order hasn't arrived yet — two weeks is far too long. Could you please share your order number so I can look into this right away and get it resolved for you?

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: I received the wrong item in my package.
response: I sincerely apologize for sending the wrong item. Please share your order number and a photo of what you received, and I'll arrange for the correct item to be sent out immediately along with a return label for the wrong one.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: My product arrived completely damaged.
response: I'm so sorry your item arrived damaged — that's completely unacceptable. Please send us a photo of the damage along with your order number and we'll send a replacement or issue a full refund right away.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: I want to return my purchase and get a refund.
response: Of course, I'd be happy to help with that. We offer hassle-free returns within 30 days. Please share your order number and I'll send you a prepaid return label and process your refund as soon as we receive the item.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: I was charged twice for the same order.
response: I sincerely apologize for the double charge — that should never happen. Please share your order number and I'll escalate this to our billing team immediately to get the duplicate charge refunded to you as quickly as possible.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: My discount code isn't working at checkout.
response: I'm sorry the discount code isn't working. Could you let me know which code you're trying to use? I'll check whether it's still valid and apply the discount to your order manually if needed.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: I need to cancel my order urgently.
response: I'll do my best to cancel your order right away. Please share your order number and I'll check whether it's still within the cancellation window. If it has already been dispatched, I can arrange a return and full refund instead.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: My package shows as delivered but I never received it.
response: I'm sorry to hear that. Sometimes packages are left with a neighbour or in a safe location nearby. Could you check around your property first? If it still can't be found, please share your order number and I'll raise a formal investigation with the courier.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: I want to cancel my monthly subscription.
response: I'm sorry to see you go. I can cancel your subscription right away so you won't be charged again. Could you confirm the email address on your account so I can process this for you?

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: I haven't received my refund yet and it's been two weeks.
response: I apologize for the delay — that's much longer than it should take. Could you share your order number so I can check the status of your refund? If there's been an issue processing it, I'll escalate this immediately.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: The item I received doesn't match the description on the website.
response: I'm sorry the item doesn't match what was described. Please share your order number and a photo of what you received, and I'll arrange a return and send you the correct item or issue a full refund — whichever you prefer.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: I ordered the wrong size, can I exchange it?
response: Absolutely, we can arrange an exchange for you. Please share your order number and the size you need, and I'll get that sorted right away. I'll also send you a return label for the original item.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: My account has been locked and I can't log in.
response: I'm sorry you're having trouble accessing your account. For security purposes I'll need to verify your identity. Could you confirm the email address associated with your account so I can unlock it for you?

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: I was charged the wrong amount for my order.
response: I apologize for the billing error. Please share your order number and the amount you were charged, and I'll have our billing team review it and correct the charge immediately.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: My order is missing several items.
response: I'm sorry part of your order is missing. Please share your order number and which items you didn't receive, and I'll arrange for the missing items to be sent out to you or issue a refund for them.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: I never received a confirmation email after placing my order.
response: I'm sorry you didn't receive a confirmation email — it may have gone to your spam folder. Could you share the email address you used to place the order? I'll resend the confirmation right away.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: The tracking link in my email isn't working.
response: I'm sorry the tracking link isn't working. Please share your order number and I'll look up the latest tracking information for you directly and send you an updated link.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: My order has been stuck in transit for over a week.
response: I'm sorry your order has been delayed in transit — that's very frustrating. I'll contact the courier on your behalf to investigate. Could you please share your order number so I can get started?

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: I want to speak to a manager.
response: I completely understand. I'll escalate your case to a senior member of our team right away. Could you share your order number and a brief description of the issue so they have the full context when they reach out to you?

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: I was sent a used item instead of a new one.
response: I sincerely apologize — receiving a used item is completely unacceptable. Please share your order number and a photo, and I'll arrange for a brand new replacement to be sent immediately. I'll also flag this to our fulfilment team to investigate how it happened.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: My subscription renewed but I had already cancelled it.
response: I'm sorry the subscription renewed unexpectedly. I'll cancel it now and arrange a full refund for the renewal charge. Could you confirm the email address on your account so I can process this for you right away?

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: The product stopped working after just one day.
response: I'm really sorry to hear that — a product failing so quickly is not acceptable at all. Please share your order number and a description of the issue, and I'll arrange a replacement or full refund for you immediately.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: I accidentally placed a duplicate order.
response: No problem at all — I can cancel the duplicate order for you. Please share both order numbers and I'll get the extra one cancelled and refunded right away.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: I want to update my delivery address before my order ships.
response: I'd be happy to update your delivery address. Please share your order number and the new address as soon as possible — I can only make changes before the order is dispatched, so let's act quickly.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: My payment was declined but the money left my account.
response: I'm sorry for the confusion — this can sometimes happen when a payment is initially declined but a hold is still placed by your bank. Please share your order number and I'll work with our billing team to clarify the situation and reverse any incorrect charges.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: I received an empty box.
response: I'm so sorry — receiving an empty box is completely unacceptable. Please share your order number and a photo of the box, and I'll arrange a replacement or full refund immediately and escalate this to our fulfilment team.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: My order was returned to sender without any notification.
response: I apologize that your order was returned without any notification — you should have been informed. Please share your order number and I'll arrange for it to be resent to you or issue a full refund, whichever you prefer.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: I was charged for a free trial I thought I had cancelled.
response: I apologize for the unexpected charge. Please share your account email and I'll cancel the subscription and arrange a full refund for the charge right away.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: The colour of the item is completely different from the photo on the website.
response: I'm sorry the item doesn't match the photo — that's misleading and I completely understand your frustration. Please share your order number and a photo of what you received, and I'll arrange a return and replacement or full refund for you.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: I've been waiting on hold for over an hour.
response: I sincerely apologize for the long wait — that's far too long and I'm sorry for the frustration. I'm here now and ready to help. Please tell me what the issue is and I'll do everything I can to resolve it as quickly as possible.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: My order was cancelled without my permission.
response: I'm sorry your order was cancelled unexpectedly. This can sometimes happen due to a payment issue or stock availability. Please share your order number and I'll investigate what happened and help you reorder if needed.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: I want to know the status of my return.
response: I can check on that for you right away. Please share your order number and I'll give you a full update on where your return is in the process and when you can expect your refund.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: My order arrived late and I no longer need it.
response: I completely understand — I'm sorry the delay caused this inconvenience. Please share your order number and I'll arrange a return and full refund for you, including any shipping costs given the delay was on our end.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: I received a counterfeit product.
response: I take this extremely seriously and I sincerely apologize. Please share your order number and photos of the product, and I'll escalate this to our quality team immediately. We'll arrange a full refund and launch an investigation right away.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: I want to make a formal complaint.
response: I'm sorry to hear you've had a poor experience and I want to make sure this is addressed properly. Could you share the details of what happened along with your order number? I'll log a formal complaint and make sure it's escalated to the right team.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: The app keeps crashing when I try to place an order.
response: I'm sorry you're experiencing issues with the app. Please try updating it to the latest version or reinstalling it. If the problem continues, let me know your device type and operating system version and I'll escalate this to our technical team right away.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: I want to know if my warranty is still valid.
response: I can check that for you. Please share your order number or proof of purchase and I'll confirm the warranty status and what it covers so you know exactly where you stand.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: My gift order was delivered to the wrong address.
response: I'm so sorry about that — especially for a gift. Please share the order number and the correct delivery address, and I'll work with our courier to redirect the package or send a replacement as quickly as possible.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: I was not informed about a delay in my order.
response: I apologize for the lack of communication — you should have been notified about any delay. Please share your order number and I'll look into the current status and make sure you're kept fully updated going forward.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: I want to know when my order will arrive.
response: I'd be happy to check that for you. Please share your order number and I'll give you the latest estimated delivery date and tracking information.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: I'm not happy with the quality of the product.
response: I'm sorry the product didn't meet your expectations — that's really disappointing to hear. Please share your order number and details about the quality issue, and I'll arrange a return and refund or replacement for you right away.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: I want to add an item to my existing order.
response: Unfortunately once an order is placed it's difficult to add items directly. However, if your order hasn't been dispatched yet, I can try to cancel it so you can reorder with the additional item included. Please share your order number and I'll check right away.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: I can't find my order in my account.
response: I'm sorry you're having trouble finding your order. Could you share the email address you used to place it? It's possible the order was placed under a different account and I can help locate it for you.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: My promo code expired before I could use it.
response: I'm sorry you missed the promo window. Let me see what I can do. Could you share the code and your account email? I'll check if there's any flexibility and do my best to honour the discount for you.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: I want to exchange my item for a different colour.
response: I'd be happy to help with an exchange. Please share your order number and the colour you'd like, and I'll check availability and arrange the swap along with a return label for the original item.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: My order is showing as processing for 5 days.
response: I apologize for the delay in processing — that's longer than expected. Please share your order number and I'll look into what's causing the hold-up and give you a clear update on when it will be dispatched.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: I need a copy of my invoice for my expenses.
response: Of course, I can resend your invoice right away. Could you share your order number and the email address you'd like it sent to?

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: I was not given the sale price I saw advertised.
response: I'm sorry you weren't given the advertised sale price — that shouldn't have happened. Please share your order number and a screenshot of the advertised price, and I'll arrange for the difference to be refunded to you.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: My order confirmation shows the wrong delivery address.
response: I'm sorry about that — please share your order number right away and I'll check if we can update the address before it's dispatched. The sooner we act the better chance we have of catching it in time.

instruction: You are a helpful customer support agent. Respond professionally and empathetically to the customer message.
context: I want to know if I can get a price match.
response: We do offer price matching in some cases. Please share the item details, the competitor's price, and a link to where you saw it, and I'll check whether we're able to match it for you.
